description_long: This rifle features a modern, angular design with a matte dark green body accented by white scuff marks, giving it a rugged, utilitarian appearance. The grip and stock are black, with a pronounced ergonomic shape for comfortable handling. A large, boxy magazine with yellow and black hazard stripes is mounted beneath the receiver, suggesting a high-capacity or specialized ammunition type. The top of the rifle is flat and broad, with a small, rectangular yellow element that may serve as a sight or indicator. The barrel is short and integrated into the body, with no visible muzzle device. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A modern, angular rifle with a dark green, scuffed body, black ergonomic grip, and a large hazard-striped magazine. Features a flat top and a compact, integrated barrel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the black grip, green body, and prominent yellow-black striped magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the flat, broad top and the width of the magazine, with minimal barrel protrusion.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0 but with the grip and magazine details reversed.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the grip and the narrow profile of the rifle's body.
